title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.016 - Minority business advocacy commission to confer with division of tourism on rules
text:
37.016.  Minority business advocacy commission to confer with division of tourism on rules. — The minority business advocacy commission shall consult with the tourism commission in establishing rules and regulations for African-American and other minority business participation.
(L. 1993 H.B. 188 § 2, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 33.756
